title: andrographis ovata
intro: Andrographis ovata, also known as Kalmegh, is a perennial plant native to India and parts of Southeast Asia, belonging to the family Acanthaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Andrographis ovata include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and boosting the immune system, making it a popular natural remedy for various health conditions. Andrographis ovata can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or powder, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
